items.title: Lumana Surpasses 50,000 Cameras, Cementing Its Leadership in AI Video Surveillance
items.description: Lumana, the leader in AI video surveillance, today announced that it has surpassed 50,000 cameras. This milestone reinforces Lumana's rapid expansion and solidifies its position as the fastest-growing AI security company in a market shifting from reactive monitoring to proactive, real-time intelligence.

items.title: McDonald’s Is Watching Prices Closely, It Tells Franchisees
items.description: McDonald’s has a message for franchisees: Do more to keep meals affordable.  It will also ensure operators meet service and quality standards.  “While the U.S. has a proud legacy of delivering value to our customers, we still have opportunity to deliver more,” Mason Smoot, chief restaurant officer for McDonald’s U.S., said in a Monday message to operators.

items.title: "McDonald's Will Assess If Franchisees Are Providing Value Under New Standards; McDonald's Franchisees Worldwide Will Soon Be Assessed On How Their Prices Deliver Value, According To Memos Obtained By CNBC" - CNBC
McDonald’s will assess if franchisees are offering value for customers under new standards
items.description: McDonald's has leaned into value to appeal to cash-strapped diners who have been visiting its restaurants less frequently.

items.title: Allison Worldwide Expands Global Leadership with New Europe CEO
items.description: Allison Worldwide, part of Stagwell (STGW), has announced the appointment of Jeremy Lucas as CEO, Europe.
